top_signals.title: The 2026 World Cup had its flaws, yes, but it was a resounding success for Fifa
top_signals.summary: In the coming days following last night’s World Cup final, Fifa will release a report on how many people watched the tournament across its five and a half weeks.  Look out for the social media KPIs – impressions, engagement, video views – that major sporting bodies now have to report, but the headline number will [...]
